backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all backend data types (Service, Vessel, GiftCard, CareerInquiry, etc.) and canister logic including blob storage, access control, user management, and gift card operations for the KD Platform.
backend/users/Users.mo: Motoko module providing user management functions (create, find, list) with an OrderedMap-backed state holding user records identified by auto-incrementing Nat IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three Internet Identity authentication features (login gate, header principal display, guest-mode content) to their target files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, hooks, styles, config, and HTML entry points for the KD Platform React application.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter Card markup, Google Analytics 4 tracking, Font Awesome CDN, and JSON-LD structured data for Blackgold Kdenterprise.
frontend/public/.htaccess: Apache configuration that enables automatic WebP image negotiation, sets cache-control headers for images, adds Vary headers, and enables compression for optimized asset delivery.
frontend/public/bgkd-giftcard-system.htm: Standalone static HTML page presenting the BGKD blockchain-powered gift card system with a hero banner, logo, and styled layout for maritime finance operations.
frontend/public/image-optimization-repor: A styled HTML report page for Blackgold Kdenterprise displaying image optimization statistics, including stat cards, image lists with badges, and a tech stack section.
frontend/public/noc-mini-widget/embed-ex: A demo page showcasing the NOC Mini Widget Ultra-Enhanced Pack with interactive controls, feature descriptions, and configuration code examples.
frontend/public/noc-mini-widget/final-sn: A minimal ready-to-paste HTML snippet that includes the NOC Mini Widget markup, configuration script with ultra-enhanced effects enabled, and references to its CSS and JS files.
frontend/public/noc-mini-widget/noc-mini: Stylesheet for the NOC Mini Widget implementing a glassmorphism floating card with collapsed/expanded states, animated pulse indicators, status badges, TVL trail canvas, and neon glow effects.
Standalone HTML page that renders the NOC Mini Status Widget with collapsed and expanded states, displaying metrics such as TVL, Omni-Mesh, AI Self-Healing, Black Hole Mode, and a mini chart canvas.

A self-contained JavaScript widget (v3.0.0) that renders a floating glass-card NOC status panel with live TVL metrics, animated charts, and optional ultra-enhanced visual effects (neon pulse, radar ring, TVL trails). It reads configuration from `window.NOC_MINI_WIDGET_CONFIG` and respects the user's reduced-motion preference.
frontend/public/noc-mini-widget/README.t: Documentation for the NOC Mini Status Widget Ultra-Enhanced Pack v3.0.0, providing copy-paste HTML/JS snippets, configuration options, and descriptions of TVL gradient trails, neon pulse, and radar ring visual effects.
frontend/public/press-release.html: A standalone HTML press-release page announcing the launch of the BGKD Crypto Token by Blackgold Kdenterprise, scheduled for June 1, 2025. It includes full SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter Card markup, a canonical URL, and Google Analytics 4 tracking.
frontend/README.md: Brief README describing the KD Platform frontend stack: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Internet Identity auth, and React Query for state management.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration for the entire frontend, registering all application routes (home, services, fleet, crypto, KD Platform, KD Ship education sub-routes, KD Trust, etc.) under a shared root Layout component.
frontend/src/components/kd/AdminAddUserC: A card form component that allows admins to add a new user by name and email, using the useAddUser mutation hook and displaying success or error feedback.
Renders a search input and category dropdown filter bar for the AI Hub, computing per-category tool counts from the full database and displaying a filtered/total count badge.
Displays a profile card for Hemant Kamble and a grid of AI tool cards with category color badges, favorite toggling, and external links, filtered by the parent component.
frontend/src/components/KDTrustDashboard: A React dashboard component that displays a simulated multi-org trust-node monitoring panel with live-updating metrics (latency, CPU, trust score, uptime), color-coded alerts, per-node AI remediation actions, org summaries, and a Recharts line chart for uptime/anomaly history.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The top-level shell component that renders the sticky navigation header (with dropdown menus, mobile sheet menu, Internet Identity auth button, and theme-aware branding for KD Ship / KD Trust / default views) and an `<Outlet>` for child routes.
frontend/src/components/noc/ComplianceSh: A static card displaying VARA compliance status badges including license, stage 3 submission, and a $75B target ARR with a launch timeline note.
frontend/src/components/noc/Institutiona: A static card showing three institutional metrics—capital pipeline ($4.8B), global market share (98%), and staking terminal PnL accuracy (97%).
frontend/src/components/noc/LiveOperatio: An interactive operational dashboard rendering an SVG node graph of backend canisters with live-simulated transaction rate and cycle usage metrics, tooltips, and status indicators driven by props.
frontend/src/components/noc/NOCAdminSect: An admin control panel card for managing users (add/remove by principal) and toggling universal launch state, with toast notifications and total user count display.
frontend/src/components/noc/NOCMiniWidge: React component that embeds an ultra-enhanced NOC mini widget by dynamically loading its CSS/JS assets and rendering placeholder DOM elements for TVL, Omni-Mesh, AI healing, and chart metrics with live data updates via a custom hook.
frontend/src/components/noc/NOCStatusWid: Fixed-position NOC status widget card that displays TVL, AI self-healing, and other metrics with expand/collapse and hover behavior, sourcing data from a custom metrics hook and accepting optional status props.
frontend/src/components/noc/UniversalLau: Card component that displays a 'Universal Launch Active' overlay with a live countdown timer (starting at 14 days) and Omni-Mesh/Black Hole Mode status badges fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/OptimizedImage.t: A React wrapper around `<picture>` that automatically serves WebP versions of JPG/PNG images with a fallback to the original format, applies lazy/eager loading based on a `priority` prop, and skips WebP conversion for social-media or token logo assets.
frontend/src/components/shipping/CreateS: Form component for creating a new shipment, supporting dynamic cargo item management, date validation, and submission via a React Query mutation that maps form data to the backend's CargoItem type.
frontend/src/data/aiTools.ts: Static data file defining an AITool interface, a list of category strings, and a large TOOLS_DATABASE array of AI tools with names, descriptions, URLs, and categories spanning research, image, writing, and more.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates/refetches dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, identity persistence, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useKDTrustFavorites.t: Custom hook that manages a persisted list of favorite AI tool names in localStorage, exposing the favorites array and a toggleFavorite function.
Custom React hook that persists and restores the last search term and category for KD Trust using localStorage, exposing state setters for both values.
frontend/src/hooks/useNOCMiniWidgetLiveU: Hook that feeds live NOC metrics (TVL, Omni-Mesh, AI self-healing, Black Hole Mode) from React Query into a global `window.updateNOCWidget` function, refreshing every 5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useNOCStatusWidgetMet: Hook that derives and returns structured NOC widget metrics (TVL, AI self-healing, Black Hole Mode, predictive failover) from backend data, falling back to simulated values when data is unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central collection of React Query hooks wrapping all backend actor calls, covering services, vessels, company info, tokenomics, gift cards, forms, and more.
frontend/src/hooks/useUniversalLaunchRep: React Query hooks specifically for the Universal Launch Report, polling treasury status, Omni-Mesh status, cycles balance, and DAO proposals every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind directives, defines maritime and KD platform CSS custom properties (OKLCH colors), and declares NOC dashboard animations like pulse-glow and data-flow.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page component displaying company heritage text, core values cards with icons, and a loading spinner while company info is fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/CareersPage.tsx: Renders a careers page with a hero section, benefits grid, programs section, and a contact inquiry form that submits via the useSubmitCareerInquiry mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Displays company contact information (address, phone, email) fetched from the API and provides a contact form that submits messages via the useSubmitContactForm mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/CryptoTokensPage.tsx: Shows a crypto token/tokenomics page with a live countdown timer to a June 2025 launch date, tokenomics data fetched via useGetTokenomics, and an investor inquiry form.
frontend/src/pages/FleetPage.tsx: Renders a fleet listing page where each vessel card shows vessel details, an optional image, capacity, and a collapsible list of active shipments fetched per vessel.
frontend/src/pages/GiftCardSystemPage.ts: Provides a gift card management interface with Internet Identity authentication, canister/network info display, gift card listing/analytics, and user profile management on the Internet Computer.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for the maritime company site featuring a hero section with background image, a metrics grid (vessels, crew, countries, years), and a services overview, pulling data from the `useGetCompanyInfo` hook.
frontend/src/pages/KDDashboardPage.tsx: Authenticated dashboard for the KD Platform that displays total users, token contract info, and network status cards, with an admin section conditionally rendered based on `useIsCallerAdmin`; redirects unauthenticated users to a login card.
frontend/src/pages/KDPlatformLandingPage: Simple landing page for the KD Token Platform with a centered hero text block and a single 'Enter Dashboard' button that navigates to `/kd-platform/dashboard`.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/AdminDashboard: Admin-only page (requires Internet Identity login) showing summary stats for students, courses, certificates, and pass rates, with tabbed management sections.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/CertificatesPa: Authenticated page that displays a user's earned maritime course certificates, currently showing an empty state prompting course completion.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/CourseBrowserP: Displays a static catalog of maritime education courses (IMU-CET, DNS, STCW) as cards with subject/topic counts and a view-details button.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/CourseDetailPa: Displays a placeholder course detail page using the courseId route param, showing upcoming features (subjects, video lessons, study notes) with a navy/teal KD Ship theme.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/KDShipLandingP: Landing page for the KD Ship maritime education platform, featuring a hero section with navigation to courses/dashboard and feature cards for IMU-CET, DNS, and STCW offerings.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/QuizPage.tsx: Placeholder quiz page that displays the quizId from route params and a message indicating backend integration is pending.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/StudentDashboa: Student dashboard requiring Internet Identity login; shows overview stats (enrolled courses, completion rate, quiz average, certificates) and quick-action cards once authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/kdship/SubscriptionPa: Displays Free, Basic, and Premium subscription tier cards with feature lists and pricing; notes that payment processing is deferred to Phase 2.
frontend/src/pages/KDTrustPage.tsx: KD Trust Monitor page that combines a live node telemetry dashboard, an AI tools hub with search/category filtering, and an Internet Identity auth banner for syncing favorites across devices.
frontend/src/pages/NOCPage.tsx: Network Operations Center page requiring Internet Identity authentication; displays AI status, treasury, DAO proposals, ZK proofs, OmniMesh status, and admin controls via multiple specialized sub-components.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Maritime services listing page that fetches services via `useGetServices`, renders them in an icon-decorated card grid with a detail dialog, and includes special Oil & Gas sector highlight sections with images.
frontend/src/pages/ShipmentDetailPage.ts: Displays detailed information for a single shipment fetched by ID, including route, status badge, and formatted timestamps, with navigation back to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/ShippingDashboardPage: Lists all shipments in a filterable table with status badges and provides a dialog to create new shipments via CreateShipmentForm.
frontend/src/pages/UniversalLaunchReport: Authenticated page that displays a KD.WebAI NOC launch report showing treasury status, OmniMesh status, cycles balance, and DAO proposals fetched from backend queries.
frontend/src/types/noc-mini-widget.d.ts: Global TypeScript declaration file that extends the Window interface with optional NOC Mini Widget configuration and update function types.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens for maritime, kdship, and kd themes, custom font families (Inter, Orbitron), container settings, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the KD Trust dashboard's architecture, existing features, known issues, and three pending Internet Identity integration steps (frontend auth, Motoko backend favorites, frontend-backend wiring).
